title: Clipse and Pharrell Williams Perform Together at 2026 Grammy Awards
text: Rolling Stone covers Clipse's historic performance at the 2026 Grammy Awards with producer Pharrell Williams. The performance marked a significant moment for the reunited duo, who were nominated for Best Rap Album for Let God Sort Em Out. Though Clipse did not win Best Rap Album, their performance and their first Grammy win for Chains & Whips represented validation of their comeback effort. Pharrell Williams' production throughout their reunion album and at the Grammy Awards ceremony showcased the strong creative partnership that defined their classic work in the 2000s. The performance drew significant audience acclaim, with many noting that Clipse remained as sharp and compelling as ever. Their appearance at the Grammys reinforced their status as elder statesmen of hip-hop with continued relevance and creative power.
